questions.q: According to a May 17, 2026 report, Microsoft's $1 billion AI data center project in Kenya hit a major hurdle because meeting its power needs would require doing what?
options: Switching off half the country's electricity
questions.correctText: Switching off half the country's electricity

questions.q: Which AI company's stock fell 5.7% on May 17, 2026, amid a broader tech sell-off following a hotter-than-expected April Consumer Price Index report?
Which company debuted its AI-iPanel, an AI-powered distribution cabinet, at the OPTATEC Photonics and Laser Exhibition in Frankfurt, as reported on May 17, 2026?
On May 17, 2026, which entertainment giant pulled back the curtain on its Imagineering robotics lab to showcase how its next-generation characters come to life?
